mapper.select:
SELECT eduStudentExamAnswer.* , eduStudentExamRecord.exam_no AS examNo , eduQuestionBank.question_title AS questionTitle FROM edu_student_exam_answer eduStudentExamAnswer LEFT JOIN edu_student_exam_record eduStudentExamRecord ON eduStudentExamAnswer.exam_record_id = eduStudentExamRecord.id LEFT JOIN edu_question_bank eduQuestionBank ON eduStudentExamAnswer.question_id = eduQuestionBank.id
ORDER BY eduStudentExamAnswer.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_student_exam_answer eduStudentExamAnswer LEFT JOIN edu_student_exam_record eduStudentExamRecord ON eduStudentExamAnswer.exam_record_id = eduStudentExamRecord.id LEFT JOIN edu_question_bank eduQuestionBank ON eduStudentExamAnswer.question_id = eduQuestionBank.id

SELECT eduStudentExamAnswer.* , eduStudentExamRecord.exam_no AS examNo , eduQuestionBank.question_title AS questionTitle FROM edu_student_exam_answer eduStudentExamAnswer LEFT JOIN edu_student_exam_record eduStudentExamRecord ON eduStudentExamAnswer.exam_record_id = eduStudentExamRecord.id LEFT JOIN edu_question_bank eduQuestionBank ON eduStudentExamAnswer.question_id = eduQuestionBank.id
ORDER BY eduStudentExamAnswer.create_time DESC

SELECT eduStudentExamAnswer.* , eduStudentExamRecord.exam_no AS examNo , eduQuestionBank.question_title AS questionTitle FROM edu_student_exam_answer eduStudentExamAnswer LEFT JOIN edu_student_exam_record eduStudentExamRecord ON eduStudentExamAnswer.exam_record_id = eduStudentExamRecord.id LEFT JOIN edu_question_bank eduQuestionBank ON eduStudentExamAnswer.question_id = eduQuestionBank.id WHERE eduStudentExamAnswer.id = #{id}
